creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #5)
> Probably not a blocker after ports r458870.

Agreed, let me change that.

(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #6)
> Although I was working on an update but .. We can close it then.

Why that?  It's still an issue and the port is not marked for expiration,
so either fix it or mark it for expiration (and see it fixed or removed
later) would be my thinking.
